C H A P T E R 0 1
THE DEVELOPER BEHIND THE CODE
Anshik Singh is a Computer Science student at IIT Roorkee and a passionate Full Stack
Developer with over 5 years of experience building scalable, visually stunning and high-
performance digital platforms.
Originating from Ayodhya, India, Anshik has collaborated with clients across the USA,
France, Russia, Japan and beyond — turning ideas into immersive digital realities.
C O R E T E C H N O L O G I E S
● HTML • CSS
● JavaScript
● Full Stack
● UI/UX Design
● Deployment + DevOps
